What we automate

Every touchpoint in the
real estate sales cycle.

From the first enquiry to the signed contract — we automate the repeatable work so your agents can focus on relationships.

01

Lead Qualification AI

Every inbound enquiry — WhatsApp, web form, portal listing — is instantly scored, categorised, and routed to the right agent with a full brief.

GPT-4oWhatsApp APILead scoring
02

Automated Follow-Up

Prospects who don't reply get a carefully timed follow-up sequence. No lead goes cold. No agent needs to chase manually.

n8nEmailWhatsAppSMS
03

CRM Integration

Every enquiry, conversation, and outcome flows automatically into your CRM. Full pipeline visibility with zero manual data entry.

HubSpotSalesforcePipedrive
04

Property Portals

Custom listing portals with real-time availability, multi-currency pricing, virtual tour integration, and enquiry capture.

Next.jsReactCustom dev
05

Agent Performance Reporting

Automated weekly reports for every agent: calls made, leads converted, pipeline value, and ranking against team benchmarks.

ReportingKPI dashboardsAutomation
06

Document Automation

Generate tenancy agreements, offer letters, and MOU documents automatically when a deal progresses — pre-filled from CRM data.

Document generationE-signatureLegal
Case study

Cocktail Holidays — Dubai

→

The problem

A luxury property portal in Dubai was receiving 200+ enquiries per week. Agents were taking 4+ hours to respond. Hot leads were going cold.

→

What we built

An AI qualification engine connected to WhatsApp. Every enquiry is scored in real time, routed to the right agent, and an initial response is sent within 90 seconds — automatically.

→

The result

94% of enquiries are fully handled by the AI. Agents only see qualified, ready-to-talk leads. Enquiry volume increased 38% within 60 days of launch.

See full portfolio →

your real estate pipeline?
